data.description: Deferred hardening (accepted limitation, ADR 0046). rebar provides prevention (pinned keys, fail-closed, append-only merged log) but no independent Rekor-style witness, so there is no third-party DETECTION of key misuse. Acceptable at the FISMA-Moderate target (single controlled environment + Gerrit auth + audit). Future option for higher assurance: a bundled inclusion-proof or KEY_ADD monitoring/alerting as a 'Rekor-lite' for the high-authority environment key. Not scheduled.
data.title: Transparency-log / independent-witness posture for high-authority op-cert keys
